_meta.description: Tracks the simulation's progress through its 365-day (1 simulated year) run. agent-runner.js's scheduled() advances current_day/week/month/quarter on each work-day cycle, checks `milestones` for the current day, and updates `stats`. This file holds the INITIAL state at simulation start; live state is persisted in D1 (`year_stats` table, schema.sql Part 10) and KV (SIM_KV) — this file is the seed/reset value, not a live document.

time_scale.description: Mirrors simulation-config.json TIME_SCALE: 1 real hour (the scheduler's hourly cron) = 1 simulated work day.
time_scale.note: current_day counts calendar days (1-365); current_week/month/quarter are derived from elapsed simulated work days (260/year) for meeting cadence, while milestones below are keyed to calendar day numbers.

day_1.label: Simulation Kickoff
day_1.description: First simulated work day. Daily standups begin (relationships.json meeting_default_attendees.daily_standup: agents 5 and 7). All agents start at mood=50, irritation=0.

day_30.label: First UI Update Due
day_30.description: Designer (agent 9) first_update_deadline_days (30) — the first of 4 quarterly_updates is due. Monthly review meeting also occurs around this point.

day_90.label: Q1 Quarterly Review
day_90.description: First quarterly review. IT Chief (agent 5) raises quarterly_demand (equipment/network/programming optimization). Architect (agent 10) files quarterly_report (big project updates). Designer's 2nd quarterly_update target window opens.

day_180.label: Mid-Year Semi-Yearly Review
day_180.description: Semi-yearly review. Promotion candidates (promotion-config.json criteria) are first formally discussed, though no promotions are decided until day 365. Designer's 3rd quarterly_update target window opens.
actions: pre-evaluate promotion-config.json criteria for all eligible agents

day_270.label: Q3 Quarterly Review
day_270.description: Third quarterly review. Architect's quarterly_report and IT Chief's quarterly_demand re-evaluated. Designer's 4th and final quarterly_update target window opens.

day_365.label: Year-End Review & Promotions
day_365.description: Yearly meeting. Full promotion-config.json year_end_process runs: CEO nominations, admin team vote (CEO vote_weight=2 + veto_rights), promotion-results-year-1.md generated. CEO writes the executive summary and recommendations for next year. Designer's 4th quarterly_update should be complete.
actions: reset year-tracker for year 2 (current_day -> 1, increment a year counter in year_stats)

_meta.description: Tracks AI-generated assets/web-app prototypes from admin-tier agents (see agents-config.json can_generate_assets and agents/config/asset-platforms.json) through review. Live state persists in D1 (a future `assets` table); this is the seed/reset value.
